Flow.description: Creates Bed Allocation with existing/add-new patient and existing/add-new room paths.
Flow.label: HMS Bed Allocation

recordCreates.name: create_BedAllocation_ExistingPatientExistingRoom
recordCreates.label: Create Allocation Existing Patient Existing Room

recordCreates.name: create_BedAllocation_ExistingPatientNewRoom
recordCreates.label: Create Allocation Existing Patient New Room

recordCreates.name: create_BedAllocation_NewPatientExistingRoom
recordCreates.label: Create Allocation New Patient Existing Room

recordCreates.name: create_BedAllocation_NewPatientNewRoom
recordCreates.label: Create Allocation New Patient New Room
